events.title: EC Midday press briefing of 10/07/2026

items.title: EC Midday press briefing of 10/07/2026
items.summary: ANNOUNCEMENT - President’s agenda for next week ANNOUNCEMENT - 31 year anniversary of Srebrenica genocide ANNOUNCEMENT - Commission preliminarily finds the addictive design of Instagram and Facebook in breach of the Digital Services Act ANNOUNCEMENT - Hungary joins the European Public Prosecutor’s Office, further strengthening protection of EU funds ANNOUNCEMENT - Today’s Councils RULE OF LAW - Hungary joins the European Public Prosecutor’s Office, further strengthening protection of EU funds: Q&A ENLARGEMENT - Albania: Q&A COMMISSION - President’s agenda for next week: Q&A WAR IN UKRAINE - EU sanctions against Russia: Q&A PRESIDENT AGENDA / DEFENCE / WAR IN UKRAINE - Outcome of the NATO Summit in Ankara, Türkiye / Gift received by EC President von der Leyen and participants from Türkiye President Erdoğan / European anti-ballistic system proposal by Ukraine / US-Ukraine deal on Patriot missiles: Q&A INSTITUTIONAL AFFAIRS / DIGITAL AFFAIRS - Academics call for Irish Presidency of the Council to recuse itself from discussions on digital files and corporate tax / Irish Regulatory and Data Protection Authority: Q&A CLIMATE - EU’s response and preparedness to protect people against recurring heatwaves and wildfires: Q&A TRADE - Options papers on Products originating from Israeli illegal settlements: Q&A Exterior views of the European Commission Berlaymont building Recorded cutaways

events.title: EC archives of the week

items.title: EC archives of the week (28/06-04/07): Luxembourg European Council (28-29/06/1991, 35 years ago) Danube Day (29/06) Birth Robert Schuman (29/06/1886, 140 years ago) Luxembourg European Council (29-30/06/1981, 45 years ago) Presentation of Sweden's request for membership of the EC (01/07/1991, 35 years ago) Ireland holds the rotating presidency of the Council of the EU (01/07) Application of the EU-South Korea Free Trade Agreement (01/07/2011, 15 years ago) Enlargement to Croatia (01/07/2013, 13 years ago) Awarding of the Robert Schuman medal to Konrad Adenauer, former German Federal Chancellor (02/07/1966, 60 years ago) End of single use plastics (03/07/2021, 5 years ago) End of single use plastics (03/07)
